name_en: Size change chip, custom top-grain cowhide
name_cn:
Size change chip, custom top-grain cowhide
Top-tier original order
M45497 Black M45555 Beige
This NeoNoé medium bucket bag features LV letters and Monogram flowers printed and embossed on leather for a striking look. The interior pocket securely holds valuables, and the adjustable shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear.
Detailed features 26.0 x 26.0 x 17.5 cm (L x H x W)
Embossed grained calfskin, calfskin trim, microfiber lining, metal hardware, center zip pocket, pocket divider, metal grommets, strap: detachable, adjustable, strap half-length: 31.0 cm, strap half-length adjustable to: 54.0 cm, handle: single handle
